stimulus: Composer Antonin Dvořák greatly admired the work of Bedřich Smetana, a Czech nationalist composer. In fact, scholars believe that a melody from Smetana’s 1874 symphonic poem Má vlast likely inspired the main theme of one of ______blank Symphony No. 9.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The singular possessive proper noun “Dvořák’s” and the plural noun “symphonies” correctly indicate that Dvořák wrote multiple symphonies that were famous.

Choice A incorrectly pluralizes the surname and possessivizes “symphony’s.” Choice B omits the necessary possessive on the surname. Choice D incorrectly possessivizes “symphony’s.”
